name: ggc-docs
description: ggc documentation site (built with gohan + sleyt).

scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p assets static && cp icon.png assets/icon.png && cp ggc-config.schema.json static/ggc-config.schema.json
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
scripts.preserve: npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
